title: gbrain #486: check-update npm fallback
summary: For gbrain issue 486 / PR 826, check update should not depend only on GitHub releases because npm/bun installs may have package versions even when GitHub releases has no latest release. fetchLatestRelease now tries GitHu
body:
For gbrain issue #486 / PR #826, check-update should not depend only on GitHub releases because npm/bun installs may have package versions even when GitHub releases has no latest release. fetchLatestRelease now tries GitHub first, falls back to https://registry.npmjs.org/gbrain/latest, returns an npm package version URL, and uses api_unavailable if both sources fail.
Evidence: Issue https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/issues/486 and PR https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/pull/826. Added fake-fetch fallback regression in test/check-update.test.ts. Tests passed: bun test test/check-update.test.ts, 21 pass 0 fail; bun run typecheck and git diff --check passed.
Verified by: test/check-update.test.ts, bun run typecheck, git diff --check

context.fact:

Evidence: Issue https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/issues/486 and PR https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain/pull/826. Added fake-fetch fallback regression in test/check-update.test.ts. Tests passed: bun test test/check-update.test.ts, 21 pass 0 fail; bun run typecheck and git diff --check passed.
